---
title: "Data & Code"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta name="description" content="Data, code, replication resources, and research profiles for Nicola Borri's work in finance, sovereign risk, and cryptocurrency markets.">
        <link rel="canonical" href="https://www.nicolaborri.com/data-code.html">
        <meta property="og:title" content="Data and Code - Nicola Borri">
        <meta property="og:description" content="Data, code, replication resources, and research profiles for Nicola Borri's work in finance, sovereign risk, and cryptocurrency markets.">
        <meta property="og:type" content="website">
        <meta property="og:url" content="https://www.nicolaborri.com/data-code.html">
---

::: {.wrapper}
::: {.main-section}

# Data & Code

### Monthly Sovereign Bond Excess Returns

Monthly sovereign bond excess returns, updated monthly from 1995 onward.

Source: Nicola Borri and Adrien Verdelhan, [Sovereign Risk Premia](http://ssrn.com/abstract=1343746).

[Excel file](http://web.mit.edu/adrienv/www/SovereignPortfolios.xls)

### Replication and Code

This page will collect public replication packages, code, and datasets associated with my research. Large datasets should live in stable external repositories and be linked here rather than committed directly to the website repository.

### Research Profiles

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Z4QMV08AAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao)<br>
[SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/cf_dev/AbsByAuth.cfm?per_id=1131728)<br>
[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/search/econ?searchtype=author&query=Borri,+N)

:::
::: {.sidenav}
{{< include _includes/sidebar.qmd >}}
:::
:::
